overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077, walking through a foggy neon-lit urban alley at night. The player moves from a narrow covered market walkway past food vendors to a ramen shop plaza, ending at a foggy street with passing traffic. Heavy atmospheric fog and cyberpunk neon signage dominate the visual aesthetic.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered cyberpunk market walkway with overhead billboards

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a narrow foggy alley with covered market structures on the left

entered.detail: overhead metal and glass canopy structure with support beams covering the walkway
large illuminated advertisements mounted on the market structure showing various products
tall building with red painted exterior and metal roll-down shutters
illuminated blue and white vending machine against the red building

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow, foggy alleyway at night with a covered market structure on the left featuring glowing neon billboards. The right side shows a distinctive red building facade. The camera moves forward through the enclosed walkway with artificial lighting illuminating the misty atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: alley with street food vendors and approaching plaza

events.description: passing a food stall with bright blue neon lighting on the right side

agents.ego_description: continuing through the alley past food vendors while approaching a more open plaza area

notable_agents.action: vendor standing behind a food stall with blue lighting

entered.detail: small food vendor stall illuminated with bright cyan blue neon lights
white rectangular sign with red and blue DTR lettering mounted on the market structure
large red neon sign for BD SHACK visible in the distance through the fog

segments.scene_description: The alley opens slightly as the camera passes food vendors with blue neon lighting. The DTR sign becomes visible on the left while the BD SHACK neon sign appears in the foggy distance ahead. Pedestrians walk in the same direction, and the covered market structure recedes into the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk ramen shop plaza with purple neon signage

events.description: entering area with intense purple and pink neon lighting from the BD SHACK ramen shop
transitioning from the ramen shop plaza to the adjacent street level

agents.ego_description: approaching the BD SHACK ramen shop and observing the neon-lit plaza before moving toward the street

notable_agents.action: person sitting at the ramen counter eating, illuminated by purple neon

entered.detail: open-air ramen shop with bright purple neon trim and menu boards with Japanese characters
intense magenta and purple neon lights illuminating the shop front and seating area
white plastic chairs and tables arranged in front of the ramen shop
small manicured trees in planters lining the plaza area

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a plaza dominated by the BD SHACK ramen shop's intense purple neon lighting. Outdoor seating and decorative trees fill the center area while pedestrians move through the space. The camera passes the shop and transitions toward the street level where traffic barriers and streetlights become visible through the thick fog.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy urban street with illuminated traffic barriers

events.description: a vehicle passes by on the foggy street, headlights cutting through the mist

agents.ego_description: standing at the street corner observing the foggy road and passing traffic

notable_agents.action: sedan driving slowly through the fog with headlights on, passing from left to right

entered.detail: multi-lane road disappearing into heavy fog with streetlights creating light beams
tall streetlamps lining the road with bright white lights illuminating the fog
concrete barriers with illuminated pink and blue panels separating the sidewalk from the street

segments.scene_description: The camera turns to face the foggy urban street, with the BD SHACK building now on the left. Traffic barriers with glowing panels line the sidewalk while streetlights pierce through the dense fog. A car slowly passes by on the wet asphalt, its headlights cutting through the mist as the video ends.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement through a claustrophobic, neon-lit alleyway that gradually opens into a wide, foggy urban street. It begins within a narrow covered market walkway, gliding past glowing billboards and a red building facade under artificial lights that illuminate the thick mist. As the camera moves forward, the enclosed structure recedes to reveal food vendors bathed in blue neon and the distant glow of the BD SHACK sign. The scene then expands into a vibrant plaza dominated by intense purple lighting and outdoor seating before transitioning toward the street level. Finally, the camera turns to face the wet asphalt of the main road, where glowing traffic barriers line the sidewalk and a passing car's headlights pierce through the dense, atmospheric fog.
